creator: alex.perechnev@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 252981
Patch to update monero-cli from 0.18.3.1 to 0.18.3.2

Hi

I'd like to contribute a patch to upgrade monero-cli to 0.18.3.2

I built it with poudriere on a 14.1-RELEASE jail and have it running normally in another 14.1-RELEASE system.

Changelog: https://github.com/monero-project/monero/releases/tag/v0.18.3.2
